title: Allow formatting and hyperlinking URLs in notifications
excerpt: It would be great if we could hyperlink and format URLs while sending out notifications. Currently, if you have a URL in a notification, not only does it not hyperlink but you also can’t separate the link text and the ac…

posts.author: JaimishAshar (Jaimish Ashar)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if we could hyperlink and format URLs while sending out notifications. Currently, if you have a URL in a notification, not only does it not hyperlink but you also can’t separate the link text and the actual URL. It would be great if there was a way to do this. Supporting markdown in notifications would be one way to do it.
